_comment: Central threshold configuration for DOAR pipeline v2. All thresholds are marked with their justification source.

image_quality._blur_source: empirical — standard OpenCV practice; values <100 indicate motion/defocus blur
image_quality._low_res_source: heuristic — below 200px detail is insufficient for symbol detection
image_quality._quality_divisor_source: heuristic — maps typical Laplacian range [0-500+] to [0,1]

color_extraction._active_source: heuristic — below 2% a color does not meaningfully contribute to composition
color_extraction._paper_source: standard — grayscale value >230 reliably indicates blank paper

composition._baseline_source: convention — bottom 20% of page used as grounding strip
composition._baseline_density_source: heuristic — loose threshold to detect minimal grounding marks

stroke_features._fragmentation_source: heuristic — contours <100px² counted as fragmented marks

object_detection._region_source: heuristic — tuned down from 600 to catch small figures in children's drawings

clip_confidence._people_note: heuristic — abstract child figures score 0.20–0.26; lowered to reduce false negatives
clip_confidence._concerning_note: heuristic — raised to reduce false positives on sensitive categories

visual_claim_validator._object_note: heuristic — objects must exceed this to be shown as verified
visual_claim_validator._concerning_note: heuristic — weapons/threatening imagery require high confidence; sensitive claims
visual_claim_validator._eye_note: heuristic — eye state (closed/angry/wide) is hard to distinguish; conservative
visual_claim_validator._animal_note: heuristic — distinguishing fox vs. squirrel vs. cat requires higher confidence

ocr._ocr_source: heuristic — PaddleOCR scores below 0.65 show high handwriting misread rate
ocr._uncertain_note: heuristic — OCR between 0.65 and 0.80 flagged as uncertain

psychological_rules._empty_source: heuristic — Koppitz (1968) and Malchiodi (1998) reference notably sparse compositions
psychological_rules._empty_low_source: heuristic — drawing <20% of page is compositionally very small
psychological_rules._dark_moderate_source: heuristic — Malchiodi (1998) references dark palette as potential indicator
psychological_rules._stroke_source: heuristic — proxy for heavy pressure; cannot be directly measured from static image
psychological_rules._diversity_source: heuristic — fewer than 3 active colors considered restricted palette
psychological_rules._red_source: heuristic — Alschuler & Hattwick (1947) reference strong red dominance
psychological_rules._theme_source: heuristic — theme scores below this are suppressed

rule_weights._comment: Objective, feature-based rules have higher weights than symbolic/projective rules

show_to_user_thresholds._psych_note: Shown only when based on verified features AND safety_status == safe
show_to_user_thresholds._uncertain_note: Uncertain claims are never presented as facts

numeric_validator._tolerance_source: heuristic — ±5% tolerance for numeric claims vs computed values
